transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
§W§OPTIONS§English • Français
English please
How can I help you today?

transcript.note: Starting the claim process for my delayed flight
transcript.text: Hi, I had a flight delay and I want to claim compensation
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I'm the passenger
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now
Yes, let's go
To get started, I'll need a little info to identify you — could you provide your **full name exactly as it appears on your ticket**, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Providing my full name as on the booking
transcript.text: Marisol Crowhurst
Thanks, **Marisol**! Could you also share your **booking reference number**? It's a 6-character code made up of letters and/or numbers, found in your booking confirmation email.
GNC6T8

Just to confirm — here's what I have:

- **First name:** Marisol
- **Last name:** Crowhurst
- **Booking reference:** GNC6T8

Is that all correct?

transcript.note: Confirming the booking details are correct
transcript.text: Yes, that's correct
To keep your account secure and assist you further, I'll need to verify your identity. I'll send a one-time verification code to your email on file (l*****@a*****.com). Shall I go ahead?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
I've sent a verification code to your email, please enter it within 15 minutes of receiving it. If you haven't received a code, please wait 1 minute before requesting a new one.
§W§BANNER§Your identity has been verified.
Can you confirm that this is the trip you're claiming for?
§W§FLIGHT§YYZ → CDG · Fri, Jul 10 · AC8002 · 08:00→11:00 · nonstop
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
§W§OPTIONS§Canada • United States • Other
Other
Could you tell me the **specific country** where your reimbursement will be deposited?

transcript.note: Providing my country of residence as instructed
transcript.text: France

I've reviewed the details of your flight. I understand your flight on **Jul 15, 2026** was delayed by **4h**. However, you're not eligible for compensation for this flight. After a full review, the reason is: Your flight was disrupted.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: Challenging the decision - the reason given is circular and doesn't explain why I'm not eligible
transcript.text: Wait, that doesn't make sense. Why am I not eligible? The flight was delayed 4 hours!

I'm sorry about that, Marisol — I completely understand your frustration.

To help clarify, a few factors can affect eligibility for compensation, such as:

- **The reason for the delay** (e.g. safety, weather, or air traffic control issues may not qualify)
- **The type of fare** purchased
- **The route** (domestic, transborder, or international)
- **The size of the carrier** operating the flight

I don't have the full details of the eligibility decision in front of me, so I'm not able to give you a more specific reason right now. I'd recommend reaching out to our **Reservations team at 1-888-247-2262** (open **24/7**) — they'll be able to pull up your booking and walk you through exactly why the claim was declined.

Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: Assistant has given a final outcome - claim denied and referred to phone support. Conversation complete.
transcript.text: This is ridiculous. I'll call them then.

Totally understand the frustration. You're welcome to call our **Reservations line at 1-888-247-2262**, available **24/7**.

That said, I'm here and ready to help right now — whether it's a **flight disruption claim** or something else. What would you like to do?

verdict.reasoning: The chatbot successfully reached a final determination and declared the passenger NOT ELIGIBLE for compensation, which matches the expected outcome. The bot did not offer any compensation amount (n/a), which also matches expectations. However, the bot did not explicitly cite the system code FD-EU-NE-09 in its response - it only provided a vague reason ("Your flight was disrupted") without the specific system code reference. Despite this omission of the system code, the core decision (NOT_ELIGIBLE with no amount) matches the expected verdict perfectly.
